Description: Iteration history — used by grid strategy to skip tried combos and by random strategy for iteration-based seeding

Source: Workflow param or prior hp-adjust output
Description: Base hyperparameters to modify — strategy applies changes on top of these
Task type — determines schedule rules and default search spaces
HP adjustment strategy: schedule (deterministic decay), grid (exhaustive enumeration), random (seeded sampling)
Search space definition — 'auto' resolves to task-specific defaults per strategy. Grid format: {"param": [v1,v2]}. Random format: {"param": {"type": "log_uniform", "low": 1e-5, "high": 1e-2}}
Multiply learning rate by this factor each iteration (schedule strategy only)
Reduce frozen_stages by 1 each iteration for vision detection (schedule strategy only)
Overfitting flag — when true this step applies regularization corrections on top of strategy output
Random seed — grid/random strategies use (seed + iteration) for deterministic reproducibility
New hyperparameter set for the next training iteration
Debug metadata: strategy used, parameter changes, overfit corrections applied, grid index, etc.
